title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a new model that performs comparably to the Pro tier at lower cost. The guide demonstrates eight practical workflows including multimodal vision, video analysis with Python charts, contract analysis with reasoning modes, code generation, voice-to-task conversion, error fixing, receipt OCR, and Workspace agentic chains.
